name: Mobile Degen Dashboard
description: Mobile-first dashboard for active agents, open positions, PnL, receipts, copy links, referral stats, and pause controls.
degenPitch: All active chaos in one pocket dashboard with a big pause button.
whatItDoes: Shows active agents, PnL, open exposure, receipts, copy links, and referral stats.
Surfaces max pain, kill switch, and pause controls.
Keeps live actions wallet-owned and client-signed.
cursorPrompt: Build a Mobile Degen Dashboard with DNA x402. Show active agents, PnL, open positions, receipts, copy links, referral stats, max pain, and pause controls. Keep all live actions client-signed.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Mobile Degen Dashboard with DNA x402. Show active agents, PnL, open positions, receipts, copy links, referral stats, max pain, and pause controls. Keep all live actions client-signed.
exampleFlow: User reviews receipts and risk profile
receiptProofBehavior: Receipt links paid unlocks to dashboard history.
No fake PnL can be imported without labels.
